items: Pi joins as a first-class agent provider
Claude joins as a first-class agent provider, running through `claude -p` per Anthropic's terms of service
Right-click a note in the file tree or Folio to get Show in Finder, which opens Finder with the file selected
The Mermaid editor embeds a fixed-height canvas in the note, with pan, fit, and Cmd-wheel zoom
Quick Note can now append to any note in the current space with an in-window folder-grouped picker
Active TOC dashes shift to the accent color, and the collapsed container drops its extra styling so only the dashes show
The file tree Notes header now has expand-all and collapse-all controls for quickly opening or closing every folder
Mermaid renders through beautiful-mermaid with sanitized SVG, and clicking into the source switches between editable text and the rendered diagram
The sidebar collapses once the window drops to 760px and stays closed until you make it wider, with the main area expanding to fill the gap
The expand sidebar button greys out while the window is too narrow to reopen the sidebar
The floating TOC tracks the active heading as you scroll through a note

Delete and Backspace trigger the confirmation flow for focused files and folders in the sidebar tree, folders in the Folio sidebar, and selected notes in Folio mode, while leaving text inputs and rename fields alone
The file tree highlights the open file without lighting up its parent folder
The Mermaid Play/Stop overlay and the bundled mermaid package
Fixed OpenCode event streams closing before completion
You can now rename files by clicking the title in the editor
Database relation and multi-select pills now use the app accent color instead of per-value colors
Sidebar, Folio, database, and view rename fields now edit like plain text instead of boxed inputs
YAML and frontmatter editing now feels like part of the editor
About settings now has cleaner copy and less unused code
Restored and simplified the global app scrollbar styles
Fixed Folio note renaming
Folio search and sort controls now respect the collapsed-sidebar space
Editor tab bar controls now start to the right of the floating sidebar button
Removed the animation when switching between the command palette and search
Removed the folder name and note count from the top of Folio mode
Removed the note count from the sidebar All Notes item, including fetching, storage, announcements, rendering, and styling
Removed the duplicate Support and Diagnostics section from About settings
The editor feels cleaner and faster, with quicker slash commands and AI responses
Tags now use your theme accent color for a more consistent workspace
The sidebar has a cleaner layout with less visual noise
Glyph now opens file previews in the default macOS app
Table tag and value suggestions now stay above neighboring cells while you edit them
Right sidebar resizing now tracks the pointer more cleanly
Removed automatic updates and the related General settings text
Removed the task progress setting. Task progress indicators stay on
Removed the database note count setting and the note total from database headers
Removed HTML export, note printing, Zen Mode, and markdown saving from the web view
Removed Git sync status from the sidebar footer
Removed the delightful Glyph setting and related code
Trimmed the built-in theme list
